bullets.text: Directed global delivery of Google programs including Starline, TechTalk, Data Centers, and eXi initiatives, managing full project lifecycles with individual budgets ranging from $50K to $1M.
Owned end-to-end execution of a global Data Centers Program, leading a distributed team of 9 across the US, Canada, London, and Norway — delivering on scope, schedule, and budget.
Reduced delivery timelines by 15% through resource optimization and workflow refinement across a portfolio of concurrent global programs.
Implemented performance dashboards and structured reporting cadences, increasing on-time completion rates by 20% year-over-year across the program portfolio.
Strengthened executive-level client relationships with Google stakeholders, improving strategic alignment and long-term vendor positioning for multi-year program delivery.
Administered over $5M in annual capital budgets across 20–40 concurrent enterprise AV and IT infrastructure projects, identifying cost efficiencies post-design phase without compromising scope.
Led financial forecasting and program governance for the enterprise WDX Refresh Program at NYU Langone Health, overseeing budget planning, fiscal year giveback strategy, and replenishment modeling.
Served as cross-functional liaison across ITBO, Procurement, and ERP workflows (ONIT, PeopleSoft) to ensure compliance, contract alignment, and execution accuracy across enterprise programs.
Directed emergency ICU conversion during COVID-19, overseeing AV and infrastructure installations across 274 patient rooms under mission-critical conditions and compressed timelines.
Led clinical technology deployments including BrainLab Operating Rooms and Epic-support infrastructure, aligning execution with hospital compliance standards and clinical stakeholder requirements.
Managed 10+ enterprise AV/IT integration projects annually ranging from $500K to $1M for financial sector clients including JP Morgan, Morgan Stanley, and MetLife.
Led flagship MetLife HQ buildout delivering 30+ conference rooms, two large-format video walls, and enterprise digital signage — coordinating Sales, Procurement, Fabrication, and Field Operations.
Directed cross-functional coordination across four internal departments, increasing project velocity by 25% through improved process standardization and communication frameworks.
Formalized program-wide pipeline tracking and capital planning visibility, enabling proactive forecasting and data-driven decision-making for enterprise stakeholders.
Progressed from Systems Administrator into enterprise program leadership, building deep expertise across Microsoft 365, Cisco VoIP, SharePoint, structured cabling, and AV integration platforms.
